Our New Classmates.name: Fiestas Patrias Parade Planner
Our New Classmates.overview: Students plan a mock Fiestas Patrias parade, using the future simple tense to describe roles and the first conditional for planning.
Our New Classmates.general_objective: Develop event planning skills and conditional language use.
specific_objectives: Use future simple for role descriptions
Apply first conditional for planning scenarios
Our New Classmates.technology_integration: Use video creation tools for documentaries and digital design platforms for visual materials.

Our New Classmates.name: Fiestas Patrias Celebration Documentary
Our New Classmates.overview: Students create a short documentary about Fiestas Patrias traditions, highlighting event preparations, cultural practices, and celebrations.
Our New Classmates.general_objective: Develop documentary production and cultural research skills.
Our New Classmates.technology_integration: Use video recording and editing software for documentary production.

Our New Classmates.name: Fiestas Patrias Celebration Mural
Our New Classmates.overview: Students collaborate to create a mural showcasing key elements of Fiestas Patrias, including cultural symbols, traditional attire, and parade scenes.
Our New Classmates.general_objective: Develop collaborative art creation and cultural representation skills.
Our New Classmates.technology_integration: Use online design tools for collaborative digital murals.

Cultural Connections.name: Where Are You From?
Cultural Connections.overview: Students interview classmates about their backgrounds, using questions about origins and previous experiences.
Cultural Connections.general_objective: Develop interview skills and personal history vocabulary.
Cultural Connections.technology_integration: Use digital recording and presentation tools.

Cultural Connections.name: What Was Your Previous School Like?
Cultural Connections.overview: Students research and compare different school experiences, using descriptive language and past tense.
Cultural Connections.general_objective: Develop research skills and descriptive comparison abilities.
Cultural Connections.technology_integration: Use digital research and comparison tools.

Cultural Connections.name: Cultural Background Presentation
Cultural Connections.overview: Students create digital presentations about classmates' cultural backgrounds and school experiences.
Cultural Connections.general_objective: Develop digital presentation and synthesis skills.

Legends of Panama.name: I Celebrate This Tradition Because
Legends of Panama.overview: Students research and present about cultural traditions, explaining reasons using 'because' and descriptive language.
Legends of Panama.general_objective: Develop cultural storytelling and explanatory skills.

Legends of Panama.name: In This Region, They Have a Custom Of
Legends of Panama.overview: Students research regional customs and present findings using appropriate descriptive structures.
Legends of Panama.general_objective: Develop regional research and descriptive presentation skills.
Legends of Panama.technology_integration: Use digital research and presentation tools.

Legends of Panama.name: Cultural Customs Digital Archive
Legends of Panama.overview: Students create a digital archive of regional customs with descriptions and multimedia elements.
Legends of Panama.general_objective: Develop digital archiving and multimedia documentation skills.
Legends of Panama.technology_integration: Create digital archives with multimedia integration.

Visiting the Panama Canal.name: My Favorite Legend
Visiting the Panama Canal.overview: Students analyze and present their favorite Panamanian legend, using descriptive language and narrative structures.
Visiting the Panama Canal.general_objective: Develop literary analysis and narrative presentation skills.

Visiting the Panama Canal.name: Once Upon a Time
Visiting the Panama Canal.overview: Students write their own legends using traditional story structures and descriptive language.
Visiting the Panama Canal.general_objective: Develop creative writing and traditional storytelling skills.
Visiting the Panama Canal.technology_integration: Use digital writing and publishing tools.

Visiting the Panama Canal.name: Digital Legend Collection
Visiting the Panama Canal.overview: Students create a digital collection of Panamanian legends with multimedia enhancements.
Visiting the Panama Canal.general_objective: Develop multimedia storytelling and digital publication skills.

Career Goals.name: The Vessels Are Big Because
Career Goals.overview: Students research Panama Canal vessels and explain their characteristics using cause-and-effect language.
Career Goals.general_objective: Develop technical description and cause-effect language skills.
Career Goals.technology_integration: Use digital research and presentation tools.

Career Goals.name: A Vessel Is Crossing
Career Goals.overview: Students describe the process of vessels crossing the canal using present continuous and sequential language.
Career Goals.general_objective: Develop process description and tense application skills.

Career Goals.name: Canal Virtual Tour
Career Goals.overview: Students create a virtual tour of the Panama Canal with descriptive narration.
Career Goals.general_objective: Develop virtual tour creation and descriptive narration skills.

Transportation in Panama.name: I Want to Be a Doctor Because
Transportation in Panama.overview: Students research and present about career goals, explaining reasons using 'because' and future planning language.
Transportation in Panama.general_objective: Develop career exploration and explanatory language skills.

Transportation in Panama.name: To Become a Doctor, First I Will Need To
Transportation in Panama.overview: Students create educational plans for their career goals using sequential future language.
Transportation in Panama.general_objective: Develop educational planning and sequential future language skills.

Transportation in Panama.name: Career Pathway Digital Portfolio
Transportation in Panama.overview: Students create digital portfolios showcasing their career research and educational plans.
Transportation in Panama.general_objective: Develop digital portfolio creation and career documentation skills.

Our Wonderful Ocean.name: The Benefits of Public Transportation
Our Wonderful Ocean.overview: Students research and present about public transportation benefits using comparative language.
Our Wonderful Ocean.general_objective: Develop research analysis and comparative language skills.
Our Wonderful Ocean.technology_integration: Use digital research and analysis tools.

Our Wonderful Ocean.name: Rules of the Road
Our Wonderful Ocean.overview: Students research and explain transportation rules using imperative and modal language.
Our Wonderful Ocean.general_objective: Develop rule explanation and instructional language skills.

Our Wonderful Ocean.name: Transportation Safety Digital Guide
Our Wonderful Ocean.overview: Students create interactive digital guides about transportation safety and rules.
Our Wonderful Ocean.general_objective: Develop interactive guide creation and safety education skills.
